title: Jesus, meek and gentle
publicDomainBasis: George Rundle Prynne (1818–1903), Timothy Richard Matthews (1826–1910). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Jesus, meek and gentle,
Son of God most High,
Pitying, loving Savior,
Hear Thy children’s cry.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Pardon our offences,
Loose our captive chains,
Break down every idol
Which our soul detains.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Give us holy freedom,
Fill our heart with grace;
Lead us on our journey,
Till we win the race.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Jesus, meek and gentle,
Son of God most high,
Pitying, loving Savior,
Hear Thy children’s cry.
